content:
The new game mode has a good core, but I think the community agree that it still need alot of work, here are some feedback/improvement

Need immediate help:

1. Change team comp specific missions to permanent mission instead of limited time mission, this is too time consuming and not friendly to new players, not everyone have time to spend a bunch of time to play this game mode



Gameplay feedback:

1. If this is supposed to be a Slay the spire inspired game mode, there should at least be the option to choose pathing nodes in the game. Currently the mode just go through a fix pattern of battle ->event->battle->event->battle->shop

It would be better if after each battle, there is the option to choose where to go next (e.g. heal/event/shop/battle)



2. At the end of each stage, allow player to choose between a selection of 2/3 stage, instead of forced into a random one. For example Doll stage is terrible for doresain, and paradise veil also counters alot of team that is reliant on a single dps and can't dispel seal. 


3. More deck thining options. Doubling the starting deck is fine, but honestly there should be more deck building options, the easiest one to implement would be card delete. There are already event in the mode that offer card delete, but would be nice if there were more, to allow for more deck customization.


4. BRING BACK ORISON! WHY ARE THEY SO RARE IN THIS MODE



Further improvements 

1. Since deck building should be an important factor, why not have a tawil event that allow your team to get a card from a awakener that's not in your current team? Or just a custom made card for the mode!


2. Bonus upgrades in exploration,  for example, after beating an elite, you can choose to get mouchette pursuit / pollux passive for an awaker in the party


I think with these fixes the game mode will be much more interesting and long living. Though I do understand it will take time to implement these

Can we be able to see our high score on the train mode on our keeper profiles?
I want to flex on f2p noobs that Im better than them in every possible way!

I asked for a refund because I made a mistake in the payment method.
I'm thinking of paying again when I get a refund. Can I get a refund?
